arts.ttl: Dane Scarlett scores first Spurs goal to spark progression in Europa League
arts.sum: DANE Scarlett scored his first goal for Tottenham Hotspur as his header sparked a 3-0 win in the Europa League at home against Elfsborg.

arts.ttl: Tottenham 3-0 Elfsborg: Academy trio Dane Scarlett, Damola Ajayi and Mikey Moore score their first Spurs goals to secure progress in the Europa League
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW AT THE TOTTENHAM HOTSPUR STADIUM: The breakthrough came from Dane Scarlett, who spent the first half of the season on loan at Oxford United.

arts.ttl: Scott Twine on Bristol City form, Manning bond and expecting the unexpected in transfer windows
arts.sum: Although it has taken a bit longer than Twine, Manning or Bristol City supporters would have initially hoped, the Reds' marquee summer signing now feels that he is playing the best football of both his spells in the West Country. In the eight games since Boxing Day's win over Luton Town, the former Burnley man has scored three goals and laid on two assists for his teammates in all competitions to help pull the Robins right back into the battle for the play-off places .

arts.ttl: Liam Manning explains Fally Mayulu and Kal Naismith transfer calls after Bristol City loan exits
arts.sum: Liam Manning has explained Bristol City's decision to allow both Fally Mayulu and Kal Naismith to leave Ashton Gate on loan after the two players joined Sturm Graz and Luton Town respectively. Although Manning was insistent that the 22-year-old could still have a future at Ashton Gate once his loan spell with Sturm Graz comes to an end, he felt Mayulu needed more consistent minutes than were on offer in BS3 to continue his development this season.

arts.ttl: Preview: Oxford United vs. Bristol City - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Oxford United and Bristol City, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Liam Manning provides Mark Sykes contract update after Bristol City reject Stoke City offer
arts.sum: Liam Manning has confirmed that there has been transfer interest in Bristol City winger Mark Sykes but insists that he doesn't see the winger "going anywhere" this month, with talks ongoing about activating the extension in his contract. Bristol Live understands that Stoke City are interested in the Republic of Ireland winger and have seen a bid rejected by the Robins for his services this month, as first reported by Football League World, with the Reds believed to be keen to keep the former Oxford United man at Ashton Gate beyond the end of the winter transfer window.
